goals.short_name: B.C.'s courts are fair, safe and accessible

main_services.name: Resolve a civil or small claims dispute
Get help filling out and filing court forms

goals.short_name: Families can resolve family law matters and keep children safe

main_services.name: Resolve a separation, divorce or parenting dispute
Get child or spousal support calculated and enforced

goals.short_name: People are protected and supported through the criminal justice system

main_services.name: Get support as a victim or witness of crime
Understand how criminal charges are assessed and prosecuted

goals.short_name: British Columbians can access justice and have their human rights protected

main_services.name: Get help with a human rights complaint or protection
Get free or low-cost legal help

acts.summary: Protects people in B.C. from discrimination and harassment based on protected characteristics; establishes the independent Human Rights Tribunal to mediate and adjudicate complaints.

sections.title: Human Rights Tribunal and complaint process
sections.description: Sections on filing, deferring, dismissing and settling complaints, and the powers and procedure of the Human Rights Tribunal.

services.name: File a human rights complaint
services.ms_name: Get help with a human rights complaint or protection

services.name: Get information about your rights under the Human Rights Code
services.ms_name: Get help with a human rights complaint or protection

acts.full_name: Guide Dog and Service Dog Act
acts.summary: Governs certification of guide dog and service dog teams, providing public access and tenancy protections for certified handlers.

sections.title: Certification of dog and handler teams
sections.description: Application, testing, certification, and cancellation or refusal of certification for guide and service dog teams.

services.name: Certify a guide dog or service dog team
services.ms_name: Get help with a human rights complaint or protection

acts.summary: Governs parentage, parenting arrangements, guardianship, child and spousal support, family property division, protection orders, and out-of-court resolution of family law disputes in B.C.

sections.title: Resolution of family law disputes and Provincial Court orders
sections.description: Provisions on resolving family law disputes out of court and Provincial Court Family Law Act orders.

services.name: Apply for a Family Law Act order online
services.ms_name: Get help filling out and filing court forms

services.name: Get in-person, phone or video help with a family law issue
services.ms_name: Resolve a separation, divorce or parenting dispute

services.name: Resolve a family dispute through mediation
services.ms_name: Resolve a separation, divorce or parenting dispute

sections.title: Protection orders
sections.description: Provisions allowing the court to make protection orders to prevent family violence, and their registration.

services.name: Get help keeping your family safe from violence
services.ms_name: Resolve a separation, divorce or parenting dispute

services.name: Register a protection order
services.ms_name: Get support as a victim or witness of crime

acts.summary: Authorizes the BC Family Maintenance Agency to enforce child and spousal support orders and agreements.

sections.title: Enforcement of support orders and agreements
sections.description: Authority to collect, calculate and enforce payment of child and spousal support orders and agreements.

services.name: Enrol a support order or agreement for enforcement
services.ms_name: Get child or spousal support calculated and enforced

acts.summary: Continues the Legal Services Society (Legal Aid BC) to assist individuals in resolving legal problems and provide legal aid to people in British Columbia.

sections.ref: Role of the Legal Services Society
sections.title: Objects and role of the society
sections.description: The society's objects are to assist individuals to resolve legal problems, facilitate access to justice, and establish and administer legal aid.

services.name: Apply for legal aid
services.ms_name: Get free or low-cost legal help

acts.summary: Establishes the BC Prosecution Service and Crown Counsel's independent authority to make charge assessment decisions and conduct prosecutions and appeals.

sections.title: Independence and functions of Crown Counsel
sections.description: Crown Counsel act independently of police and government in charge assessment, prosecution, and appeals, and prepare victims and witnesses for court.

services.name: Learn how a criminal charge is assessed and prosecuted
services.ms_name: Understand how criminal charges are assessed and prosecuted

services.name: Prepare a victim impact statement
services.ms_name: Get support as a victim or witness of crime

services.name: Get information as a witness in a criminal case
services.ms_name: Get support as a victim or witness of crime

services.name: Conduct criminal prosecutions independent of political direction

acts.summary: Governs Small Claims Court procedures and the monetary jurisdiction for civil disputes.

sections.title: Small Claims Court procedures and monetary jurisdiction
sections.description: Establishes Small Claims Court's monetary jurisdiction (up to $35,000) and simplified procedures compared to Supreme Court.

services.name: Resolve a small claims dispute
services.ms_name: Resolve a civil or small claims dispute

acts.summary: Establishes the Civil Resolution Tribunal, an online tribunal resolving small claims up to $5,000, and strata property and society disputes.

sections.title: Tribunal jurisdiction over small claims, strata and society disputes
sections.description: Sets out the Civil Resolution Tribunal's jurisdiction over small claims, strata property, and cooperative association and society disputes.

services.name: Resolve a low-value dispute through the Civil Resolution Tribunal
services.ms_name: Resolve a civil or small claims dispute

acts.summary: Establishes the Justice and Public Safety Council to develop a strategic vision and plan for B.C.'s justice and public safety sector and advise the minister.

sections.title: Justice and Public Safety Council
sections.description: Establishes the council, its objects, advisory boards, strategic planning duties, and annual Justice Summit.

services.name: Coordinate justice system reform through the Justice and Public Safety Council
